its time to look serious but in a vintage designer way

guys im getting owned by private equity again went to networking events and now i feel poor and sad and too emo so ofc i had to buy some miu miu and prada. also some balmain dont hate me future me and im about to pull the trigger on this perfect freaking feather bolero thing the next issue is just my hair then i will be professional maxxing
i fucking love this marc by marc jacobs blazer like omg also as soon as i saw @zoifish in this dress+bolero combo i knew i had been gravely underestimating the necessity of having fur/feather in ones wardrobe. i mean come on look at her it totally elevates what would otherwise be a basic ahh fit
ok all i want to be when im 25 is cierra oday. her prada collection is fucking insane and makes me question everything. thanks to her i bought the prada skirt above and miu miu heels. ready to be chic even though im a lowly engineer. hopefully not for long tho... but chat why is this prada collared shirt $300 like who ???
so also like do i go all black. cause ts eats so hard. something i struggle with all the time like are ppl gonna think im emo.. no im just cunt. i feel like this cdg jacket could be a good addition.
so after thinking about all this i really do need the unrelated following: - silver bracelets - black going out top - black pants/jeans - new silver hoops - hair oil - heat protectant god life really just forces you into a box. the basic box. i dont want to be practical but i have no choice... like going on revolve hurts me same w ssense. i want to ascend but how ---

Trying to be emo fr this time
So it is now Shopping September and here is all the damage I have inflicted so far.

So it is now Shopping September and here is all the damage I have inflicted so far. Mainly easy clothes to wear for going to class and feeling fire on the weekends. Links at the bottom!!!! I finally pulled the trigger on this Vivienne shirt thats been sitting in my ebay likes for over a year. Shes beautiful and the perfect length and fit. Also I finally found the cutest suede moto Balenciaga flats that literally go with everything and satisfy my craving for a city bag
I then decided i needed more long tops that hit the top or below my low rise pants. i love poshmark bundles!
And then i wanted it to be fall so Im getting ready with these:
Needed some classic bottoms, inspired by cierra o'day. I love these kotn sweats but $148 was diabolical. brandy had my back tho
And finally some much needed basics. I broke my sunnies the other day . and im obsessed with this skims lacy bra

Shoe fever cause mine disintegrated rip

so i need new shoes. literally all of mine are like in hospice on their deathbed just waiting for the fly to buzz right.

uhhh so i need a comfy summer shoe that i can just throw on also i want my feet to look small i guess. i never was a fan of flats but after getting the balenci ones and breaking them in i realized the hype. so easy to wear.

so yeah idk if i want neutral or fun vibes. here are some options. also i swear to god repettos were like $200 max 2 years ago and now theyr $495 like hello???
